note: Repo-scoped adaptation of the fleet hub's canonical spec/secrets.json, per the repo-config downstream carry. This repo publishes to NuGet via keyless OIDC Trusted Publishing and uploads coverage to Codecov, so the fleet baseline applies plus the nuget-oidc and codecov mechanisms. AUDIT.md cross-checks these names (values are never read).

baseline.note: The App-token secrets power the App-signed merge-bot (auto-merge that re-triggers downstream workflows), which every fleet repo runs; also consumed by codegen and the upstream-version tracker where present. Used via actions/create-github-app-token with the client-id input (not the deprecated app-id). The CODEGEN_* name is historical, not codegen-specific.

codecov.note: Coverage upload is report-only (fail_ci_if_error: false), so a Codecov hiccup never fails the gate.
